privileged_info_summary: The dns.cap file is a real network capture (4,338 bytes, 38 packets) containing DNS traffic with multiple record types (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, LOC, PTR) sourced from the official Wireshark SampleCaptures wiki. The task requires agents to produce a dns_audit_report.txt containing all unique domain names, DNS record types with query counts, DNS server IPs, total query count, and total response count. This is a network audit task (not synthetic data) verified against official Wireshark sample captures.
